title: juncus kochii
intro: Juncus kochii, also known as Koch's rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of kidney stones. Juncus kochii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies.
